title: Set Up TanStack Table (React Table v8) in Next.js
summary: Add TanStack Table v8 with sorting, filtering, pagination, and shadcn/ui integration for data-rich pages.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Table v8 in this project with sorting, column filtering, and pagination. I'll use shadcn/ui table primitives if they are already installed, or plain HTML table elements otherwise. If you need server-side sorting and filtering instead of client-side, say so before I begin.
